howItWorks.intro: This cat litter usage calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Monthly Litter
rules.explanation: Weekly usage times number of cats times weeks per month.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.a: About 7-10 lbs per week per cat depending on litter type.

faq.q: How often should I change litter?
faq.a: Scoop daily, full change every 1-2 weeks for clumping, weekly for non-clumping.
